{{Infobox character
| name = Duskwinder
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|smell blood}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kameira]]}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Shadow and Sea (novel)|Of Shadow and Sea]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Duskwinder is a type of [[Kameira]] that possesses the physical characteristics of a twenty-foot serpent, featuring bronze-colored scales and a spiked tail. It is equipped with wings that it uses to fly through the air or to propel itself across the ground. This creature is known for its single eye and its ability to sense blood from a distance using its three forked tongues. As it grows, the Duskwinder undergoes a process of shedding its skin. Driven by a deep-seated intent, it is motivated by a singular desire to hunt and kill the specific human responsible for its mother's death.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Duskwinder]] is a creature that can smell blood.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Duskwinder]] is a creature that unwraps itself from trees.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Duskwinder]] is a creature that can be killed with a powerful spear.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Duskwinder]] is a type of [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The shed skin of an infant [[Duskwinder]] is used in the construction of a handgun.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
